text.title: PHP Dual Gate: PHPStan Level 9 + Psalm Taint Analysis Failure Modes
text.summary: ≥3 antipatterns observed in the wild. Each pairs symptom + root-cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: phpstan.neon at level 5; null bugs ship.
antipattern.root-cause: Team capped level to avoid baseline work.
antipattern.fix: Bump to level 9; commit baseline; ratchet down quarterly.

antipattern.symptom: psalm.xml present but taintAnalysis disabled; SQLi via user input merges.
antipattern.fix: Enable taint analysis; add SOURCE/SINK annotations on entry points.

antipattern.symptom: Only PHPStan runs; taint bugs slip through.
antipattern.root-cause: Team thought one analyzer was enough.
antipattern.fix: Add Psalm in parallel CI job; tools complement, don't overlap.
